---
title: "Talk 1: Integrated Data Science"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    slide-number: true
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
editor: visual
---

## Introduction

Welcome to an integrated Quarto talk using **Python** and **R**.

---

## Python Example

```{python}
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"x": range(5), "y": range(5)})
df
